name: Israel Adesanya
oneLiner: The modern middleweight title-volume case: elite striking, repeated defenses, a title regain, and one of the deepest active title windows of his era.
compareShortCase: Adesanya is the modern middleweight title-volume case: elite striking, repeated defenses, two wins over Whittaker, and a long run as the face of the division.
compareCounter: The counterargument is that the later losses and Pereira rivalry make the case less clean than the longest-reigning champions above him.
